General.Name: Gemilang International Ltd
General.Description: Gemilang International Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and sells bus bodies in Malaysia, Singapore, New Zealand, Hong Kong, the United States of America, Australia, and internationally. It operates through Sales of bus bodies and kits; Sales of parts and provision of relevant services; Rental of motor vehicles; and Other segments. The company offers single deck, double deck, and articulated city buses, as well as single deck, double deck, and high deck coaches; and assembles buses. It is also involved in the sale and fabrication of body works for buses; trading of body kits; dealing of spare parts and related products; provision of after-sales and maintenance services; rental and leasing of motor vehicles; and trading of film and related intellectual property rights. The company provides its products and services to public and private bus transportation operators, chassis principals and their purchasing agents, bus assemblers, and manufacturers. It exports its products. Gemilang International Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Senai, Malaysia.
